creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of databases/couchdb:

ports/127854 was submitted before you took over as maintainer of
databases/couchdb.  While I would normally just close this PR as
obsolete by the new version it does appear to have some additions which
you may want to take into consideration for this port.  Specifically it
includes an RC script and a user/group change.  Would you mind taking a
look at these changes and letting me know if you want to use them?

If you do decide that these are good changes would you be willing to
submit a new patch that applies to the current version of the port?

Thanks!

-- WXS
